languages.text: {n}За чудовищными аугментами вы вдруг видите Себериана таким, какой он есть — уставшим стариком, полным сожалений.{/n}
{n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}За чудовищными аугментами вы вдруг видите Себериана таким, какой он есть — уставшим стариком, полным сожалений.{/n}

{n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hinter den monströsen Augmentationen siehst du plötzlich den wahren Seberian: einen müden alten Mann voller Gewissensbisse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hinter den monströsen Augmentationen siehst du plötzlich den wahren Seberian: einen müden alten Mann voller Gewissensbisse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Derrière ses augmétiques monstrueux, vous voyez soudain Seberian tel qu'il est vraiment : vieux, usé et rongé par les regrets.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Derrière ses augmétiques monstrueux, vous voyez soudain Seberian tel qu'il est vraiment : vieux, usé et rongé par les regrets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras los monstruosos auméticos, ves en Seberian lo que es: un anciano cansado y lleno de remordimientos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras los monstruosos auméticos, ves en Seberian lo que es: un anciano cansado y lleno de remordimientos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}O korkunç ogmetiklerin ardında aniden Seberian'ın gerçekte ne olduğunu görüyorsun: Yorgun, pişmanlıklarla dolu yaşlı bir adam.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}O korkunç ogmetiklerin ardında aniden Seberian'ın gerçekte ne olduğunu görüyorsun: Yorgun, pişmanlıklarla dolu yaşlı bir adam.{/n}

languages.text: {n}透过那些骇人的植入物，你忽然看到了塞贝里安真正的样子：一个满心悔恨的疲惫老人。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}透过那些骇人的植入物，你忽然看到了塞贝里安真正的样子：一个满心悔恨的疲惫老人。{/n}

languages.text: {n}巨大なサイボーグの背後、突然、シベリアは老いた男の姿で現れる。後悔に満ちた男である。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巨大なサイボーグの背後、突然、シベリアは老いた男の姿で現れる。後悔に満ちた男である。{/n}
